title: Elara Voss — The Notebooks
atmospheric_profile: wooden table inside weather-beaten shack: stack of handwritten notebooks tied with twine, salt-stained leather gloves, rusted key, child's faded drawing of family on a pier, cold window light, story of documentation and loss
quality_notes: Perfect symbolic representation of the creator. The salt on the gloves, the child's drawing, and the notebooks create a complete emotional biography. Excellent capstone for the world.
